steps.title: Substitute x = 8 using the given condition
steps.content: We have $f(x) = 7x + b$ and we're told that $f(8) = 56$. Substitute $x = 8$ into the function: $$f(8) = 7(8) + b = 56 + b$$ Since $f(8) = 56$, we have the equation: $$56 + b = 56$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content: From the equation $56 + b = 56$, subtract 56 from both sides: $$b = 0$$ That is the correct answer.
